summary: Completed testing of character photo upload feature. Backend photo upload functionality working perfectly (100% success rate) with proper file validation, media serving, and database integration. Frontend has critical authentication session persistence issue preventing thorough UI testing.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 422 instead of 404 for non-existent character ID

critical_bugs.issue: JWT tokens getting lost during page navigation causing automatic redirects to login

ui_bugs.issue: Users cannot access Character Builder consistently due to session loss

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test photo upload UI elements due to authentication redirects

passed_tests: Backend - Invalid file type rejection (400 error)
Backend - Media endpoint serving uploaded photos
Backend - Character list includes reference_image field after upload
Backend - Photo stored in MongoDB with asset_id
Frontend - Character Builder page structure present in code

success_percentage.frontend: 30% (loads but auth session issues prevent full testing)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication session persistence issue preventing access to protected routes. Users get redirected to login when navigating to /characters, /dashboard, /stories, etc. This is blocking full frontend testing of the photo upload UI. The JWT token handling in localStorage appears to be getting cleared or invalidated during navigation.
